creator: florent@peterschmitt.fr
text:
Many things have changed with FreeBSD 10, as CLang is now the default compiler and it uses it's own libc++.

Theses patchs make databases/mongodb building on FreeBSD 10.0-ALPHA1.

Fix: 

https://github.com/Leryan/patchs/tree/master/freebsd/ports/databases/mongodb/freebsd10.0a1
